languages.text: Совсем недавно эти люди были живы — теплая кровь продолжает медленно спускаться по вшитым трубкам.

traits.locale_text: Совсем недавно эти люди были живы — теплая кровь продолжает медленно спускаться по вшитым трубкам.
Совсем недавно эти люди были живы — теплая кровь продолжает медленно спускаться по вшитым трубкам.

languages.text: These people were alive not long ago — their warm blood keeps slowly draining into the imbedded pipes.
languages.original_text: Совсем недавно эти люди были живы — теплая кровь продолжает медленно спускаться по вшитым трубкам.

traits.locale_text: These people were alive not long ago — their warm blood keeps slowly draining into the imbedded pipes.
These people were alive not long ago — their warm blood keeps slowly draining into the imbedded pipes.
These people were alive not long ago — their warm blood keeps slowly draining into the imbedded pipes.

languages.text: Diese Menschen waren vor nicht allzu langer Zeit noch am Leben — ihr warmes Blut fließt langsam in die eingebetteten Rohre.
languages.original_text: These people were alive not long ago — their warm blood keeps slowly draining into the imbedded pipes.

languages.text: Ces personnes étaient vivantes il n'y a pas si longtemps — leur sang chaud continue de s'écouler lentement dans les tuyaux encastrés.
languages.original_text: These people were alive not long ago — their warm blood keeps slowly draining into the imbedded pipes.

languages.text: 这些人不久前还活着--他们的热血一直在慢慢地流向埋在地下的管道。
languages.original_text: These people were alive not long ago — their warm blood keeps slowly draining into the imbedded pipes.

languages.text: Estas personas estaban vivas no hace mucho: su sangre caliente sigue drenando lentamente hacia las tuberías incrustadas.
languages.original_text: These people were alive not long ago — their warm blood keeps slowly draining into the imbedded pipes.

languages.text: この人たちは少し前まで生きていた。彼らの温かい血は、埋め込まれたパイプの中にゆっくりと流れ続けている。
languages.original_text: These people were alive not long ago — their warm blood keeps slowly draining into the imbedded pipes.

languages.text: Bu insanlar kısa bir süre önce hayattaydı — sıcak kanları yavaşça gömülü borulara akmaya devam ediyor.
languages.original_text: These people were alive not long ago — their warm blood keeps slowly draining into the imbedded pipes.
